_: floor pools per dungeon tier; walls never render (void rework). Tiles = dungeon2 batch (PixelArt/Tilesets/dungeon_stone tile_N -> dungeon2_NN). Fallback: dungeon_floor_1..5. dungeon2_02 (rune) is an ACCENT: never adjacent to another rune.

1-2._: overgrown ruin: mossy cobble + worn stone

3-4._: deep stone: cracked + rubble, occasional rune

5-6._: obsidian depths: dark floors, ember cracks deepest
